subject: English
section: Class X – English – First Flight – Chapter 1: A Letter to God

activities.title: Lencho’s Letter Writing
activities.objective: Understand informal letter writing format through a simple creative task.
activities.steps: 1. Read Lencho’s letter carefully. 2. Write a short letter to God asking for help for something simple. 3. Follow correct letter format.
activities.learning_outcome: Students will learn the format of an informal letter and express ideas clearly.
activities.evaluation: Check format, clarity of ideas, and correct grammar.

activities.title: Draw the Hailstorm Scene
activities.objective: Visualize the setting and events of the story.
activities.materials: Drawing sheet, crayons or colored pencils
activities.steps: 1. Draw the field before the storm. 2. Draw the hailstorm destroying the crops. 3. Add labels describing the scene.
activities.learning_outcome: Students will understand the impact of the storm on Lencho’s crops.
activities.evaluation: Neatness, relevance to story, and correct labeling.

activities.title: Character Sketch Chart
activities.steps: 1. Write ‘Lencho’ in the center. 2. Around it, write 5 qualities (e.g., hardworking, innocent, faithful). 3. Add one example from the story for each quality.
activities.learning_outcome: Students will describe character traits with examples.

activities.title: New Vocabulary Hunt
activities.steps: 1. Find 10 new words from the chapter. 2. Write their meanings. 3. Make one simple sentence for each word.
activities.learning_outcome: Students will improve vocabulary and sentence formation.
activities.evaluation: Correct meanings and proper sentence usage.

activities.title: Role Play – Post Office Scene
activities.steps: 1. Assign roles (Lencho, Postmaster, Postman). 2. Act out the scene where Lencho receives the money. 3. Express emotions clearly.
activities.learning_outcome: Students will develop speaking skills and understand character feelings.
activities.evaluation: Participation, clarity of dialogue, and expression.

activities.title: Sequence the Story
activities.objective: Understand the order of events in the chapter.
activities.steps: 1. Arrange mixed events in correct order. 2. Paste them in notebook. 3. Read aloud the correct sequence.
activities.learning_outcome: Students will recall and organize events logically.

activities.title: Faith Discussion Circle
activities.objective: Understand the theme of faith in the story.
activities.steps: 1. Write what faith means to you. 2. Share one example from Lencho’s life. 3. Discuss in small groups.
activities.learning_outcome: Students will connect the story theme with real life.

activities.title: Design an Envelope
activities.objective: Learn how to address a letter properly.
activities.steps: 1. Draw an envelope. 2. Write sender and receiver address properly. 3. Decorate neatly.
activities.learning_outcome: Students will learn correct addressing format.
activities.evaluation: Correct placement of address and neatness.

activities.title: Emotion Matching Game
activities.materials: Flashcards with emotions (hope, anger, sadness, faith)
activities.steps: 1. Match emotions with correct scene. 2. Explain why it matches. 3. Discuss answers in class.
activities.learning_outcome: Students will understand emotional development in the story.

activities.title: Moral Poster Making
activities.objective: Identify the moral of the story.
activities.steps: 1. Write the moral of the story. 2. Draw simple pictures supporting it. 3. Present in class.
activities.learning_outcome: Students will understand the central message of faith and human kindness.
activities.evaluation: Clarity of moral, creativity, and presentation skills.
